_comment: Copy this file to dm_config.json and fill in your settings. dm_config.json is gitignored.
_setup: 1. Install Ollama: https://ollama.com  (or: winget install Ollama.Ollama)
2. Pull a model:   ollama pull llama3.2:3b
3. Set 'model' below to whichever you pulled

_model_options.llama3.2:3b: FAST  — ~2 GB, 2-3x faster, good quality for most play
_model_options.llama3.1:8b: BALANCED — ~5 GB, strong narrative, moderate speed
_model_options.HammerAI/mistral-nemo-uncensored: QUALITY — ~7 GB, best narration, slower responses
